Live Large in the Heart of Auckland CBD! Studio Apartment with Premier Facilities

Step into the excitement of city living with this stylish, fully furnished studio apartment in Heritage Tower — your affordable gateway to Auckland’s vibrant urban lifestyle!

**Experience the Ultimate in Convenience & Comfort**

This contemporary studio boasts an efficient, open-plan layout designed for effortless living. Soak up natural light through floor-to-ceiling glazing, and enjoy sleek, modern finishes throughout. The thoughtfully appointed kitchenette and smart use of space make city life a breeze—whether you’re a first-time renter, young professional, or studying.

**Why You’ll Love This Apartment:**

- **Modern studio design:** Cleverly maximized layout for comfortable living
- **Light-filled interiors:** Bright, airy, and inviting
- **Fully furnished:** Move in and start living from day one
- **Secure building:** Peace of mind with key access
- **Unbeatable CBD location:** Step outside to cafés, restaurants, universities, and transport
- **Resort-style facilities:** Indulge in exclusive access to rooftop & indoor pools, gyms, spa, and sauna
- **Cold Water included:** One less bill to worry about!

**Location, Location, Location**

Nestled on Nelson Street, you’re moments from SkyCity, Aotea Square, major universities, transport links, and all the energy Auckland has to offer. Everything you need is right at your doorstep—embrace the ultimate city lifestyle!

---

**Studio Apartment | 1 Bathroom | No Parking**

**Ready to Move In—Just Bring Your Suitcase!**

No smoking. Tenants are responsible for electricity and internet.
Move in costs 1x weeks rent in advance & 4x weeks bond.

Furnished, new carpet throughout, this spacious two-bedroom apartment offers modern living in a popular building. The large open plan living area boasts opening ranch sliders to the North East, providing stunning views of Auckland's Harbour and the old Railway Station. With a well-designed layout and approximately 61 sqm of space, this apartment is perfect for comfortable living. Residents of this secure complex have access to a lap pool, perfect for enjoying the outdoors. The unit itself also has an upgraded entry lock system. Located just a short walk away from the City centre, Britomart Station, Ferry buildings, and Queen St, this apartment offers convenience at its best. With an abundance of restaurants, eateries, and food shops within walking distance, there's no need for a car in this prime location.

Please do a drive-by to ensure you like the area and location, but DO NOT ENTER THE PREMISES under any circumstances. Property is tenanted.

Lifestyle in Regis Park

Welcome to Regis Park, where a life of luxury and tranquility awaits you. Large bedrooms and bathrooms, with double garage.

Introducing a remarkable property that will inspire you to strive for something better. Nestled in the prestigious neighborhood of Regis Park, this private sanctuary on Sovereign Street offers an unrivaled lifestyle experience.

Immerse yourself in the tranquil surroundings of Regis Park, a haven of peace and serenity. The private park, exclusively accessible to residents, offers a welcome escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Spend your afternoons strolling through the lush greenery or simply basking in the calm atmosphere.

Regis Park is known for its quiet and peaceful atmosphere, making it the perfect place to call home. Whether you're looking for a place to raise a family or seeking a retreat from the chaos of city living, this property offers the ideal balance of comfort and convenience.

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to elevate your lifestyle. Contact our property manager today to arrange a viewing and experience the beauty of Regis Park for yourself. Your dream home awaits.

Fully furnished and fab one bedroom studio

This lovely apartment sits on the 10th floor and offers great views of Manukau City. The apartment comes fully furnished, and features a good sized bedroom and kitchen with plenty of storage space. Another bonus is the fully covered balcony area which is perfect for you to enjoy your morning and afternoon tea. There is one secure covered car park provided.

Convenience is at your doorstep, with a shopping mall, train station, bus station, and town all just a short stroll away. Say goodbye to long commutes and hello to a lifestyle of ease and accessibility.

Step inside this beautifully designed apartment and be greeted by a spacious and inviting living area. The open-plan layout creates a seamless flow, perfect for entertaining guests or simply relaxing after a long day.

The bedroom is generously sized, providing ample space for a comfortable retreat. You'll wake up feeling refreshed and ready to take on the day in this peaceful sanctuary.

The bathroom is modern and well-appointed, offering both style and functionality. Start your mornings off right with a refreshing shower or wind down in the evenings with a relaxing soak in the tub.

One of the standout features of this property is the included parking space. No more hunting for a spot or worrying about the safety of your vehicle – it's all taken care of.

Don't miss out on the opportunity to make this incredible apartment your new home. Contact us today to arrange a viewing and experience the convenience and luxury that this property has to offer.

Available : 16/03/2026
Rent :$ 420
Book for a viewing online or call 09 363 1333

High End Executive Living in Pareremoremo

Private Sanctuary Awaits Discover this stunning 4 bedroom + study estate, nestled on lush, landscaped acreage in serene Lucas Heights. Fully furnished with elegant, high-end interiors, this home offers resort-style living just minutes from Albany and easy access to the Auckland CBD. Just bring your suitcase - everything else is here for you.
Property Highlights

Four spacious bedrooms + dedicated study
2.5 modern bathrooms; luxurious master ensuite with spa bath
Two generous living areas + a home theatre with integrated sound
Chef's kitchen with high-end appliances and walk-in pantry
Private master suite opening to its own sunlit deck
Sparkling saltwater pool (robotic cleaner included)
Alfresco entertaining area with jacuzzi
Peaceful goldfish pond, manicured lawns, lush gardens
Electric gated entry and double internal-access garage
Eco-friendly with tank & bore water supply
Professional gardening service included
Location Advantages
Only 8 minutes to Albany Westfield & motorway access
Near top schools, cafes, golf courses, scenic walking trails
Easy commute to Auckland CBD - yet a tranquil escape

Grounds and pool are maintained as part of Tenancy.
** There is a separate guest house located approx. 200m away that will be rented separately. However it cannot been seen from this property and is very private.

Fully Furnished, Low Maintenance Unit by the beach

The Lifestyle
Imagine finishing work and being on the sands of Stanmore Bay Beach in less than two minutes. Located just 100m from the water, 3/142 Stanmore Bay Road offers a lifestyle of ease, sun, and coastal convenience. Whether it’s an early morning swim or a sunset stroll, the best of the Coast is literally on your doorstep.

The Home
This "cute as a button" two-bedroom home comes fully furnished, making it the perfect stress-free move.
Entertainer’s Delight: A large, sun-drenched deck flows seamlessly from the open-plan living area, ideal for summer BBQs.
The Master: Features elevated views to wake up to.
The 2nd Bedroom: Perfectly set up with bunks, ideal for a small child or a home office/guest setup.
Grounds & Amenities: Forget the lawnmower. Ground maintenance is fully taken care of. The complex even features an on-site playground for the kids.

The Location
You are in the heart of the action. Walk to:
Stanmore Bay Beach & Boat Club
Leisure Centre, Pool, and Sports Fields
Whangaparaoa College
Coast Plaza (New World, retail, bars, and restaurants)

The Numbers
Rent: $540 per week (Water Included)

Move in, sit back, and enjoy the salt air. Book your viewing today.
Pets considered on request

Breathtaking Views in Tutukaka!

Wake up each morning to breathtaking sunrises and views of the Poor Knight Islands in this coastal two-bedroom home, positioned in one of the area’s most sought-after neighbourhoods. Listen to the peaceful sound of tui birdsong in the Pohutukawa trees and flax bushes and enjoy a lifestyle that will make you feel like you are on holiday every day.

Inside, the open-plan kitchen, dining, and living area creates a light-filled and welcoming space, flowing seamlessly out to an ocean-facing deck—soak up the spectacular coastal outlook.

This property comes furnished, lawn mowing is included, and water is supplied via tank, making for low cost, low-maintenance living. All that’s left to do is stock the fridge and settle in!

Properties like this are rarely available and highly sought after. Use the link below to book your viewing and submit your application—this one won’t last long!

https://www.barfoot.co.nz/properties/rental/region=whangarei-district
